design_philosophy: Brutalist, tactical, function-over-form. Pure black backgrounds to save battery, stark white text for maximum legibility, and signal red for critical actions. Oversized tap targets for use under extreme stress.

typography.instructions: Never use Inter for headings. Ensure all critical metrics (timers, coordinates) use tabular numbers. High contrast is mandatory.

spacing_and_layout.paddings: Use generous paddings. Minimum p-6 inside cards. p-4 only for dense lists.
spacing_and_layout.button_sizes: Huge tap targets. Minimum h-16. Critical buttons like SOS should be h-24 or massive blocks.

grid_system.dashboard_spans: SOS is col-span-2. Map/Compass/Timer are col-span-1 or 2 depending on importance.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none (0px) to enforce a brutalist, raw, utilitarian aesthetic. Maximum rounded-sm (2px) for inputs.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white h-16 text-xl uppercase font-bold tracking-widest hover:bg-[#FF5249] active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-[#111111] text-white border-2 border-[#333333] h-16 text-lg uppercase font-bold hover:border-white active:scale-[0.98] transition-all
buttons.sos_massive: w-full h-32 bg-[#FF3B30] text-white text-4xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest animate-pulse shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,59,48,0.4)]

cards.base: bg-[#111111] border border-[#333333] p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-20 bg-[#000000] border-t border-[#333333] flex justify-around items-center px-2 pb-safe-area z-50
navigation.nav_item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-white data-[active=true]:text-[#FF3B30]

inputs.text: bg-[#000000] border-2 border-[#333333] text-white h-16 px-4 text-lg focus:border-white focus:outline-none placeholder:text-[#52525B]

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react with strokeWidth={2} or {2.5} for high visibility. Use size={24} or size={32} for main actions.

motion.philosophy: Minimal, instant. Under stress, users don't want to wait for animations.
motion.interactions: Scale down slightly on active (click/tap) for immediate physical feedback.
motion.alerts: Use slow pulse for active states like SOS or Countdown.

media.instructions: Do not use generic placeholder images. Rely on Typography, pure CSS geometric shapes, and Lucide icons to save bandwidth and ensure instant offline loading.

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to WCAG AAA. White on pure black is >15:1. Red on black must be tested for visibility.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid. e.g., data-testid='sos-trigger-button', data-testid='nav-map-tab'.

instructions_to_main_agent: PWA & Offline: You MUST implement next-pwa or vite-plugin-pwa to ensure 100% offline functionality. Service workers must cache all assets.
MapLibre GL JS: The emergency map must use MapLibre GL JS. Implement caching for map tiles so it works offline. Use a dark/tactical map style.
Local Storage: All user data (Go-bag checklist, safe zones, emergency contacts) MUST be stored in IndexedDB or localStorage.
Flashlight/Morse: Use the Web Torch API (MediaStreamTrack) if available to trigger the actual device flashlight for the SOS feature.
Language Support: Implement a simple dictionary object or react-i18next for the 5 requested languages. Default to English.
Styling: Stick strictly to the brutalist, 0px border-radius, pure black/red/white palette. Avoid gradients or soft shadows.
